queue.task: FFT depth: implement digital filters (lowpass, highpass, bandpass, FIR/IIR), correlation, zero-padding interpolation, STFT with overlap-add synthesis
queue.summary: FFT depth: implemented FIR filters (lowpass/highpass/bandpass), IIR biquad filters (lowpass/highpass/bandpass with cascade), cross-correlation, auto-correlation, zero-pad interpolation, STFT/ISTFT with overlap-add synthesis, Goertzel algorithm, frequency response, cepstrum, pitch detection, dB conversion, white noise generator. 51/51 tests pass.

queue.task: FFT stress tests: verify FFT/IFFT roundtrip with random signals, Parseval theorem, convolution theorem, filter frequency response
queue.summary: FFT stress tests: 21 new tests covering Parseval theorem (random + sine), convolution theorem (direct vs FFT cross-check), FFT/IFFT roundtrip (50 random signals + complex signals + DFT matching), FFT properties (linearity, conjugate symmetry, DC=sum, flat impulse), filter frequency response verification (FIR -3dB, DC rejection, passband shape), STFT/ISTFT roundtrip, Goertzel vs FFT cross-check (20 random), window symmetry/peak, zero-pad frequency preservation, complex arithmetic properties. 72/72 total tests.

queue.task: FFT application: build a simple audio analyzer — detect chord/note from a multi-tone signal, ASCII spectrogram visualization
queue.summary: Audio analyzer: note frequency conversion (A4=440Hz, MIDI), note detection from FFT peaks with parabolic interpolation, chord detection (10 chord types including maj/min/dim/aug/7ths), ASCII spectrogram visualization, chord generator, DTMF tone generator + detector (Goertzel-based, all 16 keys). 24 new tests. Total: 96 tests across all FFT files.

queue.summary: Wavelet transform module: Haar, DB2, DB3 wavelets, single/multi-level DWT/IDWT with perfect reconstruction via adjoint, hard/soft thresholding, universal threshold (VisuShrink), signal denoising, multiresolution analysis, wavelet energy distribution, stationary wavelet transform (shift-invariant), 2D DWT (image processing). 24 new tests. Project total: 120 tests, 2159 LOC.
